creator: ats@first.gmd.de
text:
ports/math/gsl has a checksum for the gsl-ref.ps.gz file. I don't
get onto the original master-site, but all named secondary-site
seems to have identical versions, so it looks like a new checksum
needs to be generated.

Fix: 

Simply generate a new checksum ? It is only a manual page with
no further implications and dependencies.
How-To-Repeat: Delete gsl-ref.ps.gz from /usr/ports/distfiles and do a make checksum :-).
Wait for the fetch and the checksum mismatch.
